title: ExtlClntAppMobileSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents an external client app’s mobile app settings, such as screen lock on a mobile device.

externalClientApplication.description: The name of the associated external client app.

isScreenLockEnabled.description: Indicates whether the mobile app locks the screen after a specified timeout value.

label.description: Label for the external client app’s mobile app settings configuration.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="ExtlClntAppMobileSettings">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="externalClientApplication" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="isScreenLockEnabled" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="label" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
```
